resources.string: Identify & Treat Plant Diseases with AI
Upload a photo of your plant and our AI instantly detects diseases, provides treatment recommendations, and offers expert care advice to keep your garden thriving.
Click to upload or drag and drop
Ask me anything about plant care…
Upload a photo and get instant disease identification with detailed analysis.
Get expert treatment plans, organic remedies, and prevention strategies.
Access comprehensive information about 50+ plant diseases and pests.
Take or upload a clear photo of the affected plant part.
Our AI analyzes the image using advanced deep learning models.
Receive instant disease identification with confidence scores.
Follow tailored treatment plans and prevention tips.
Invalid file type. Please select an image.
Failed to analyze image. Please try again.
Network error. Please check your connection.
Please sign in to use this feature
How accurate is the disease detection?
Our AI model achieves over 90% accuracy in identifying common plant diseases. Accuracy may vary based on image quality and disease visibility.
What types of plants can you diagnose?
Currently, we specialize in potato plant diseases, including Early Blight and Late Blight. We are continuously expanding our database.
How should I take photos for best results?
Take clear, well-lit photos of the affected area. Ensure the symptom is clearly visible and avoid blurry or dark images.
Is there a limit on analyses?
Free users get 10 analyses per month. Premium subscribers get unlimited analyses.
Can you detect pests as well?
Yes, our system can identify common pests that affect potato plants. Pest detection is continuously being improved.
How do I implement the treatment recommendations?
Each recommendation comes with detailed instructions. For severe cases, we recommend consulting with a local agricultural expert.
